emails.subject: FW: Product Type Approval Needed (US PlasticHDPE Fin Swap)
emails.subject_base: Product Type Approval Needed (US PlasticHDPE Fin Swap)
emails.body: The product long description below will fall under the new product types: US PlasticHDPE Fin Swap Credit (Tom Moran/Wendi Lebrocq) have approved copying the profiles for the new product type from the following: US Plastic LLDPE Fin Swap. Please respond no later than 10am, Wednesday, October 23. Thank you.
